incorrects.description: Student placed incorrect values on first attempt

steps.text: Not quite. Count the rows and what's in each row.

incorrects.description: Student placed incorrect values on second attempt

params.description: First row pulses to show row emphasis.

steps.text: Here's a hint: the rows are highlighted. Count how many rows you see, then count the dots in one row.

incorrects.description: Student placed incorrect values three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: System places 7, 3, and 21 in the equation builder slots.

steps.text: Let me show you how this works. I count the rows: 7 rows. I count the dots in one row: 3 dots. So 7 times 3. Now I multiply: 7 times 3 equals 21. The equation is 7 × 3 = 21.

incorrects.description: Student placed incorrect values on first attempt

steps.text: Almost. Count the columns and what's in each column.

incorrects.description: Student placed incorrect values on second attempt

params.description: First column pulses to show column emphasis.

steps.text: Let's think about this together. The columns are highlighted now. Count the columns going across, then count the dots in one column.

incorrects.description: Student placed incorrect values three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: System places 3, 7, and 21 in the equation builder slots.

steps.text: Here, let me walk you through this one. I count the columns: 3 columns. I count the dots in one column: 7 dots. So 3 times 7. Now I multiply: 3 times 7 equals 21. The equation is 3 × 7 = 21.
